---
title: ""
format: 
  docx:
    reference-doc: reference_doc.docx
crossref:
  fig-title: "Figure"
editor: visual
params:
  bulletin_number: null
  issue_date: null
  validity_date: null
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.align = "center"
)

library(dplyr)
library(sf)
library(here)
# ============================================================
# Load custom functions
# ============================================================
source(here::here("R", "utils.R"))

# ============================================================
# Required objects expected from the processing script
# ============================================================
# max_frcst_bulletin : classified maximum 10-day risk map data
# station_summary    : station flow analysis summary
# OUTPUT_DIR         : daily output directory
# time_ref           : processing date in YYYYMMDD format

# ============================================================
# Generate dynamic texts
# ============================================================
ARTIFACT_SUBIDS <- NULL

max_frcst_bulletin <- max_frcst |>
  classify_risk(artifact_subids = ARTIFACT_SUBIDS) |>
  prepare_bulletin_regions(region_col = NULL)

hydro_summary <- max_frcst |>
  sf::st_drop_geometry() |>
  dplyr::group_by(risk) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_subbasins = n()
  )
risk_zones <- max_frcst |>
  sf::st_drop_geometry() |>
  dplyr::filter(risk %in% c("Low risk", "Moderate risk", "High risk"))

key_messages <- generate_key_messages(max_frcst_bulletin)

regional_comment <- generate_regional_comments(
  risk_data = max_frcst_bulletin
)

station_summary <- analyze_station_flows(df_plot)

station_comment <- generate_station_comments(
  station_summary = station_summary
)

# ============================================================
# Figure paths
# ============================================================

max_risk_map_path <- file.path(
  OUTPUT_DIR,
  paste0("map_max_risk_10days_", time_ref, "_forecast.png")
)

d10_risk_map_path <- file.path(
  OUTPUT_DIR,
  paste0("map_daily_risk_", time_ref, "_forecast.png")
)
hydrograph_path <- file.path(
  OUTPUT_DIR,
  paste0("hydrographs_", time_ref, "_forecast.png")
)
```

```{r caption, echo=FALSE}
n_day <- config$bulletin$forecast_horizon_days
fig1 <- if (n_day == 1) {
  "Figure 1. Situation hydrologique maximale attendue attendue demain"
} else {
  sprintf(
    "Figure 1. Situation hydrologique maximale attendue au cours des %s (%s) prochains jours.",
    number_to_french(n_day),
    n_day
  )
}

fig2 <- if (n_day == 1) {
  "Figure 1. Situation hydrologique attendue demain"
} else {
  sprintf(
    "Figure 1. Situation hydrologique attendue au cours des %s (%s) prochains jours.",
    number_to_french(n_day),
    n_day
  )
}
```

# N° du bulletin : `r params$bulletin_number` - Date d’émission : `r params$issue_date` - Date de validité : `r params$validity_date`

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Messages clés

```{r key-messages, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
cat(
  paste0("- ", key_messages, collapse = "\n")
)
```

# Perspectives hydrologiques décadaires

```{r regional-comment, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
cat(regional_comment)
```

```{r max-risk-map,echo=FALSE,fig.align='center',fig.cap=fig1,out.width="100%"}
knitr::include_graphics(max_risk_map_path)
```

```{r d10-risk-map,echo=FALSE,fig.align='center',fig.cap=fig2,out.width="100%"}
knitr::include_graphics(d10_risk_map_path)
```

# Situation des écoulements au niveau des principales stations

```{r station-comment, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
cat(station_comment)
```

```{r hydrographs,echo=FALSE,fig.align='center',fig.cap="Figure 3. Évolution prévue des écoulements au niveau des principales stations hydrométriques.",out.width="95%"}
knitr::include_graphics(hydrograph_path)
```

# Zones sous vigilance

```{r vigilance-zones, results='asis', echo=FALSE}

risk_regions <- max_frcst_bulletin |>
  sf::st_drop_geometry() |>
  dplyr::filter(
    risk_level >= 2,
    !is_artifact
  ) |>
  dplyr::distinct(bulletin_region) |>
  dplyr::pull(bulletin_region)

if (length(risk_regions) == 0) {
  
  cat("- Aucune zone sous vigilance particulière.")
  
} else {
  
  cat(
    paste0("- ", risk_regions, collapse = "\n")
  )
}
```
